concept: Camping: Where mosquitoes think you're the buffet.
title: Funny Camping Shirt - Mosquito Buffet Humor for Campers
description:
Camping: the great outdoors, scenic views, fresh air... and becoming mosquito dinner. If you've ever wondered why mosquitoes seem to invite their entire family to feast when you're sitting by the campfire, this design is for you. Witty, relatable, and perfect for anyone whose camping trips include more bug spray than marshmallows. 

Perfect for: 
- Campers who carry anti-itch cream like it's currency
- Outdoor enthusiasts with a love-hate relationship with nature
- Those who understand the REAL camping hierarchy: nature → mosquitoes → you

DETAILS:
- Bold and humorous design featuring a mosquito with its ‘dinner invitation.’
- Available in a full range of light and dark colors to match your camping vibe.
- Made-to-order just for you!

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
